name: Chocolate Chip Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, and light brown sugar in a medium bowl.
2. Add butter, eggs, and vanilla; stir well.
3. Stir in chocolate morsels and nuts.
4. Spoon into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool on a wire rack.
yields one 9-inch pie
Wonderful with vanilla or butter pecan ice cream.
